title.rendered: Business Law Attorneys | Corporate Law Firm

content.rendered:
[vc_row triangle_shape=”no”][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_column_text]

Business Law Attorneys in Fresno and Fresno Counties

In a competitive global marketplace, it can be impossible to navigate through the legal nuances and restrictions governing both domestic and international commercial transactions. That’s why businesses turn to Chuckstern Murphy Law Firm for business litigation in Fresno and Fresno counties.

Our business law firm stands ready to help your business properly establish its start-up and represent it in all future legal matters. We’ve built a team that can handle business legal matters at any level, from managing financial transactions to consulting on employee disputes.

Business litigation can be some of the most confusing areas to traverse based on the sheer amount of regulations that exist on the federal, state, local, and international levels. Trust a business law attorney in Fresno and Fresno counties to represent your business in all legal matters and to always be in your corner.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”3042″ img_size=”large”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row triangle_shape=”no”][vc_column][vc_empty_space][vc_column_text]

Business Law Experience

Our attorneys emphasized their studies and expertise in business administration while they were studying in undergraduate college. Michael, Sr. focused primarily on finance while he was working for a stock brokerage agency as a full-time student at Loyola Marymount University, Fresno. Michael, Jr. studied entrepreneurship and management to gain an understanding and appreciation of how to start a business; acquire the capital needed to maintain and grow that business; and proceed from the seed stages to growth stages.

Together, our attorneys are a team with a natural instinct to understand and solve complex business matters from all walks of life. We have helped thousands of clients start businesses, whether they are a sole proprietor or are seeking a partnership, a limited liability company, a corporation, a limited liability partnership, or a non-profit organization. Our lawyers are experts in business law and corporate law matters.

Areas of Expertise

Our team of attorneys has worked with businesses on a wide plethora of issues ranging from start-up to buy-out. Areas of business litigation include, but are not limited to:

  • Business Formation
  • Asset Purchase Agreements
  • Shareholder Agreements
  • Partnership Agreements
  • Operating Agreements
  • Contract Drafting and Negotiations
  • Corporate Dissolution
  • Franchises
  • Residential and Commercial Leasing
  • Shareholder and Board Meeting Minutes
  • Shareholder Derivative Suits

Be sure to consult our attorneys on any major business decision that could potentially impact you or your business’s interests. In addition, Chuckstern Murphy Law Firm can also consult you on legal matters ranging from business disputes, borrowing or collecting money, to retiring and selling your business. We also offer employment law and real estate litigation services that can be helpful for business owners and their interests.

Representing Businesses Through Startup

First and foremost, we can help your business in drafting up a business plan that addresses all legal concerns for your business’s growth and set-up. From there we can negotiate agreements to establish your business structure and consult on all future financial and legal considerations that need to be addressed.

By hiring a team of experienced business law attorneys, you can reduce your business’s liability and strengthen its chances of surviving its first five years (the period when a majority of businesses fail). From there, we can provide you with consulting advice and legal representation when you need it.

Incorporation can be extremely complicated from a financial and structural perspective. It’s imperative that you have someone on your side who is experienced in setting up business structures and handling business liabilities.

Always in Your Corner

We’re not just another attorney; we’re your most trusted advisors and counselors who are always there when you need us most. For all business litigation needs, including a quick consultation or evaluation, our door is always open. Contact us at our Fresno and Fresno office or get started on a free consultation online and see what we can do for you. No one can afford to be without trusted legal representation.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row triangle_shape=”no”][vc_column][vc_empty_space][/vc_column][/vc_row]
